title: OpenShell with OpenClaw
description: Playbooks for setting up OpenShell with OpenClaw on Windows, macOS, Linux, Spark, and Jetson.
content: OpenShell with OpenClaw Each playbook walks through setting up OpenShell with OpenClaw on a specific platform. Windows Set up OpenShell with OpenClaw on Windows. Playbook windows macOS Set up OpenShell with OpenClaw on macOS. Playbook macos Linux Set up OpenShell with OpenClaw on Linux. Playbook linux Spark Set up OpenShell with OpenClaw on Spark. Playbook spark Jetson Set up OpenShell with OpenClaw on NVIDIA Jetson. Playbook jetson
summary: Each playbook walks through setting up OpenShell with OpenClaw on a specific platform.
